go_criteria.threshold: ≥2/3 prompts improve with new-with-refs vs new-no-refs across ≥3/4 experts
go_criteria.operationalization: per-expert improvement_rate = new_with_refs_wins / non_tie_verdicts; per-expert threshold ≥2/3; overall ≥3/4 experts pass

rationale_for_deferral: Phase 3 dry-run uses _StubJudgeClient (runner.py:453) which deterministically returns 'tie' for every pair; no statistical signal possible. Live run requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY + live model calls; per CONTEXT D-11 deferred to Phase 6 budget decision.

ref_corpus_summary.screenplay: 5 refs (Snyder / McKee / CN shortdrama / academic / dialogue) — REFACTOR-08 satisfied with ≥3 heuristics per ref
ref_corpus_summary.editor: 5 refs (Murch / classical / montage / fxrxt / CN cutting) — REFACTOR-08 satisfied
ref_corpus_summary.colorist: 5 refs (Bellantoni / Hurkman / cross-cultural / CN audience / digital science) — REFACTOR-08 satisfied
ref_corpus_summary.style_genome: 5 refs (director archive 35 entries / genre DNA / auteur theory / cross-cultural / CN director) — REFACTOR-08 satisfied

phase6_live_run_prerequisites: config.yaml (not .example) committed locally with live credentials redacted from git
Phase 6 expand N from 3 to ≥20 prompts per expert (EVAL-05)
Phase 6 multi-judge ensemble (both qwen3-235b + deepseek-v3 invoked, not just judges[0])
go_decision_authority: Phase 4 (per ROADMAP Phase 4 GO/NO-GO GATE note); this report provides Phase 3 evidence, Phase 4 produces the formal gate decision after Phase 4 completes its own scope.

harness_validation.validity_conclusion: Runner would have produced statistically analyzable output if live judge client substituted for stub
